content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility at 26.2% with full participation (breadth 8/8 sectors positive), supporting risk appetite and cyclical leadership.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Technology & Telecom ABOVE TREND: KONTR (1W: +42.45% | 1M: +56.17%) and TTKOM (1W: +6.50% | 1M: +12.26%). Construction & REIT ABOVE TREND: TKFEN (1W: +8.79% | 1M: +61.99%) and ENKAI (1W: +7.18% | 1M: +18.32%). Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND: SASA (1W: +18.46% | 1M: +27.27%) and HEKTS (1W: +12.62% | 1M: +18.77%).

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Holding & Investment ABOVE TREND but soft: DOHOL (1W: -2.23% | 1M: +0.48%) CORRECTION intraday. Transportation ABOVE TREND but vulnerable: PGSUS (1W: +5.33% | 1M: +9.01%) and TAVHL (1W: -5.02% | 1M: +9.09%) CORRECTION. Heavy Industry modest: ARCLK (1W: -2.35% | 1M: -0.51%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +42.45% | 1M: +56.17%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +18.46% | 1M: +27.27%) ABOVE TREND; HEKTS (1W: +12.62% | 1M: +18.77%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +10.81% | 1M: +4.04%) ABOVE TREND; GUBRF (1W: +8.90% | 1M: +7.35%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TAVHL (1W: -5.02% | 1M: +9.09%) CORRECTION; SOKM (1W: -3.92% | 1M: -2.19%) BELOW TREND; TUPRS (1W: -3.41% | 1M: +0.69%) CORRECTION; ARCLK (1W: -2.35% | 1M: -0.51%) BELOW TREND; DOHOL (1W: -2.23% | 1M: +0.48%) CORRECTION.

6. Momentum Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +42.45% | 1M: +56.17%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +18.46% | 1M: +27.27%) ABOVE TREND; HEKTS (1W: +12.62% | 1M: +18.77%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +8.79% | 1M: +61.99%) ABOVE TREND; ENKAI (1W: +7.18% | 1M: +18.32%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking ABOVE TREND: AKBNK (1W: +5.75% | 1M: +14.77%), GARAN (1W: +3.82% | 1M: +10.90%), ISCTR (1W: +2.53% | 1M: +11.97%) — cyclical recovery intact, prefer large-cap balance-sheet names.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry mixed: EREGL (1W: +4.06% | 1M: +19.35%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (quant leader) (use quant ranking) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: -1.75% | 1M: +20.44%) CORRECTION — domestic demand and exports supportive but selectivity required.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND: SASA (1W: +18.46% | 1M: +27.27%) and HEKTS (1W: +12.62% | 1M: +18.77%) leading; TUPRS (1W: -3.41% | 1M: +0.69%) CORRECTION — commodity and FX sensitivity keep dispersion high.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Overweight cyclical growth and momentum (Technology & Telecom, Construction, selective Energy & Chemicals) while trimming laggards with weak 1M confirmation (SOKM, ARCLK, TUPRS); keep core banking exposure.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KONTR (1W: +42.45% | 1M: +56.17%) ABOVE TREND for continuation/mean-reversion risk; SASA (1W: +18.46% | 1M: +27.27%) ABOVE TREND on earnings/spec momentum; TKFEN (1W: +8.79% | 1M: +61.99%) ABOVE TREND for order/contract updates; TTKOM (1W: +6.50% | 1M: +12.26%) ABOVE TREND for telco demand signals.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Technology & Telecom, Construction & REIT, Energy & Chemicals — these show strongest momentum and will lead market direction.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to global risk tone and TRY moves, CBT commentary, US CPI / Fed signals and major corporate updates (TKFEN, SASA, KONTR); price-based triggers are break/hold of recent weekly highs for continuation or failure at those levels for quick rotation.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with normal volatility (26.2%) and unanimous sector breadth (8/8), favoring cyclical and momentum names led by KONTR, SASA and TKFEN. Key risks are commodity/FX shocks and profit-taking in extreme movers; stay selective and use pullbacks to add high-conviction cyclicals.
